wiki.category.neutral.text:
Sealnrtu are ont lla no eth esam eamt. Heca uanterl loer sha scaleip wni niintsdooc. Msot fo temh are sangtia hotb eth ntwo adn eth inctadesy. Emso uanterl sorle nca wni bfeero eth agme dnes elik eth Tsejer, Eyiuarrolvnto, adn Raeyermcn.
Heets are eth sorle ni eth Uanterl loer est. Yb feldatu, msot pleeop ihwt heets sorle are ont srenisdi adn od'nt wni beads no eth 'aegms occnonlusi. Rof eemalxp, eth Tsejer nwis hwne ti deis.
wiki.category.minions.text:
Iminnso is a Loer Est ttha asnocitn sorle ciwhh wni ynol if ntwo eslos. Yeht are ont aolyl ot yan occnonlusi. Yeht leaev eth agme if lla hreti simneee are aedd. Yeht 'terna srenisdi ot yan orpug, os yeht od'nt amocmtcnuie ta ihtng.

Heets are eth sorle ni eth Onimni loer est. Yb feldatu, msot pleeop ihwt heets sorle wni hwne ntwo eslos, adn are ont srenisdi. If eth ynol lsepray tlfe evali are srdfine ihwt a onimni rpelay, ttha rpelay lseeva ntwo adn nwis.
wiki.category.cult.text: Heets are eth sorle ni eth utcl loer est.
wiki.category.fiends.text: Heets are eth sorle ni eth isndef loer est. Yb feldatu, msot pleeop ihwt heets sorle are isndef lssaiyolt, tub ont srenisdi.
wiki.category.modifiers.text: Heets are soonipt ttha nca eb dbenela ciwhh naecgh eth beorihva fo eth agme.
wiki.category.abilities.text: Iltsiabie are ohw lsepray emrfrop aiscotn ni eth agme. Ot ees ahwt aiscotn uyo nca kate, ees eth lbtiiay nemu. Eth Lbtiiay nemu is ehrwe eth errtlsonloc rof msot iltsiabie are. Msot iltsiabie nahppe ta miithndg.
wiki.category.strategies.text: Eterh are a tlo fo fpuelhl rsetgsatei ttha lsepray seu ni rdeor ot lphe temh wni. Nwe rsetgsatei are tarcede veeyr ayd.
wiki.category.menus.text: Heets are fifedtrne nusme sued ot gvie pintus ot eth agme.
wiki.category.phases.text:
Eth agme sha ayd sespah adn ihtng sespah
- Rgnuid eth ihtng sespah is tlcliyayp hwne lsepray nca seu 'lrose iltsiabie adn get nnmiioftaro.
- Rgnuid eth ayd sespah, lsepray csiusds nnmiioftaro yeht lerande adn ovet no a rpelay ot klil rgnuid railt sespah.

Eth agme tlcliyayp atrsst ihwt a nebifrgi eapsh ot gvie emit ot gfireu uto ohw yoru loer kwsro, amnog eohtr ihnsgt. Fdrwtaaer, eth rdeor fo eth sespah fwsolol iths lpoo: Skdu, Ihtng, Rytoauib, Indsocsusi, Inmntanooi, ehnt if a rpelay is maneontid Osytmtnie ocsem tenx, lldofoew yb Tedgumjen, adn if eth rpelay is ndouf uytigl eth tenx eapsh is Lniaf Wdsor, ehnt nfllyia, ti polso bakc uodarn ot Skdu. Eth agme nrsu ni iths lpoo nilut eterh is eon eamt egnimainr.

Heets are eth sespah adn puorsg fo sespah ttha are ni eth agme.
wiki.article.standard.mafia.title: Inctadesy Yreharchi
wiki.article.standard.mafia.text:
Eth inctadesy yreharchi is eth smtesy ciwhh seekp eth inctadesy egbni eabl ot klil veeyr ihtng. Eth inctadesy yreharchi is a lconciotle fo lsepray owh are  inctadesy srenisdi adn yslauul inctadesy lssaiyolt. Eth smtesy fwsolol tow lesru:
* If eterh is a Inctadesy Lnkgili loer ni eth yreharchi - uchs as Rfaheodtg or Tmosipro - hwne yeht eid, theonra mmbeer fo eth yreharchi sriihent hreti loer.
* If eterh is no Inctadesy Lnkgili loer ni eth yreharchi, a inctadesy mmbeer is envgi eth inctadesy ugn. Hwne eth rpelay ihwt eth inctadesy ugn deis, theonra mmbeer fo eth yreharchi sriihent ti.

Lsepray ttha are ni eth inctadesy yreharchi nedt ot saol eb inctadesy srenisdi adn lssaiyolt. Iths nmeas yeht wni yb ilinetiangm veeyr eohtr eamt adn nca alkt terotghe rgnuid ihtng adn rytoauib.
wiki.article.standard.cult.title: Utcl Yreharchi
wiki.article.standard.cult.text:
Yb feldatu, lsepray ihwt heets sorle are utcl lssaiyolt, utcl srenisdi, adn are rtap fo eth Utcl yreharchi.
 - Eth utcl sha a nmebru fo recsacisif, tgiratns ta 0.
    - Hvnwreee a rpelay deis, eth utcl gsina 1 eaicifscr.
 - Hwne a utcl eniidrs solepta deis or sstwihec sorle, if sopesilb, a dnarmo utcl eniidrs obesecm eth solepta.
 - Hwne a utcl eniidrs otleaz deis or sstwihec sorle, if sopesilb, a dnarmo nots-ploena utcl eniidrs obesecm eth otleaz.
wiki.article.standard.whisper.title: Iesphwr
wiki.article.standard.whisper.text:
Rgnuid eth ayd, as nglo as uyo nca kaeps ni lla ahct, uyo nca iesphwr ot yan eohtr nvlgii rpelay
- Inwrshepig dssne a ievaprt ahct seesmag ot eth rpelay uyo csohe
- Ot iesphwr emoones, seu eth iesphwr cmmando or noep eth iesphwr necanlh giusn eth ntbout ni eth tslayilrep
   - Eth iesphwr cmmando is "\w#" ehrwe "#" is drelcape ihwt eth rpelay nmebru fo eth rpelay uyo twna ot iesphwr, os "\w2 Yhe, my loer is hitwc!" ipehssrw ot rpelay @2
- Hwne uyo iesphwr emoones, a seesmag is tesn ni lla ahct sginya ttha uyo dsiprheew ot eth rpelay uyo csohe, os rneeeyov sknwo ttha uyo dsiprheew ttha rpelay
 - Uyo t'nca iesphwr ot an cnasdiefrhne rpelay
 - If uyo try ot dnes an ailnidv iesphwr uyo are tesn a ahct seesmag sginya ttha uyo cant iesphwr.
wiki.article.standard.tag.title: Tga
wiki.article.standard.tag.text: Gats are ocins sohnw tenx ot rpelay namse ni eth rpelay nemu. Gats nca eb eaddd or dvoeemr yb emso sorle. Gats nca swoh nnmiioftaro elik owh eth gadrstehfo upkcab is, owh is eth Eyiuarrolvnto trgaet, owh eth nmiactroi sha agdegt, etc. Lsepray are told hwne yeht iagn adn sleo gats no eohtr lsepray.
wiki.article.standard.reveal.title: Vreael
wiki.article.standard.reveal.text:
- Hwne a rpelay is elrdeaev ot uyo, uyo nca ees hreti loer lbael, adn uyo are envgi a seesmag sginya hreti loer
- Hwne a rpelay is lnaeoedcc mofr uyo, uyo sleo hreti loer lbael, adn are envgi a ahct seesmag sginya yeht are lnaeoedcc fmro uyo
    - A rpelay sgte lnaeoedcc hwne yeht eid or itswch sorle.

 Eelnagrvi adn loer slealb are ievaprt. os if uyo ees a loer lbael, stheor thimg ont saol ees ttha loer lbael. Srenisdi are saawyl elrdeaev ot heca eohtr. ofR__ _ep_aexlm inctadesy.
wiki.article.standard.roleLabel.title: Loer Lbael
wiki.article.standard.roleLabel.text:
- Loer slealb eaparp tenx ot rpelay namse, ti wsosh ahwt loer ttha rpelay is
- Loer slealb are ont saawyl plbuic, rof eemalxp, uyo nca ees yoru onw loer lbael ta lla mties, tub eohtr lsepray nca ont
- A inctadesy mmbeer nca ees eth eohtr inctadesy meremsb loer slealb
- Hwne uyo iagn a loer lbael no theonra rpelay, uyo get a ahct seesmag sginya ttha lsepray loer swa elrdeaev ot uyo
- Hwne uyo sleo a loer lbael no theonra rpelay, uyo get a ahct seesmag sginya ttha lsepray loer swa lnaeoedcc mofr uyo
- If a rpelay ttha is elrdeaev ot uyo sstwihec sorle or deis, hreti loer lbael lliw eb lnaeoedcc
- Aedd lsepray nca ont ehva loer slealb, eth loer ttha apesapr tenx ot hreti eanm is jtus eth loer no hreti eravg. Heets nca eb uacineartc rof neasros elik eth nmiactroi or 'gerrfos lbtiiay
wiki.category.trial.text:
Eth railt sespah occur refat indsocsusi adn ned bfeero skdu, adn are eth sespah ni ciwhh lsepray nca eb tdove pu adn tdove uto.

Eth railt sespah go ni iths rdeor:
- Inmntanooi
- Osytmtnie
- Tedgumjen
- Lniaf Wdsor

A rpelay is maneontid refat ggtetin tdove pu yb emro hatn lfha fo eth nvlgii lsepray.
Refat egbni maneontid, rgnuid osytmtnie, ynol eth maneontid rpelay nca kaeps os yeht nca ededfn vehsetmsel.
Refat osytmtnie, rgnuid tedgumjen, rneeeyov oesvt teirhe uytigl or oitnncen. If eterh are emro uytigl oesvt hatn oitnncen oesvt, eth agme soge ot lniaf wdsor. Etirheosw, ti soge bakc ot inmntanooi if eterh are alisrt tlfe, or lese ti soge ot skdu.
Rgnuid lniaf wdsor, eth rpelay owh swa tdove uytigl ssay hreti slta oshtguht bfeero egbni llikde yb uictnoxee.
Eterh nca ynol eb pu ot 3 inmntanooi sespah pre ayd. If 3 alisrt nahppe adn no rpelay is euctdexe, skdu atrsst.
wiki.article.standard.ascension.title: Sieancnos
wiki.article.standard.ascension.text:
Hwne a rpelay sndcsea, yeht eid, adn hreti eravg wsosh yeht ided ued ot aetcosinn.

A rpelay sndcsea gcrcoiand ot eth niintsdooc:
- If yeht wni lerya ehnt yeht esncda, iths nca eb ued ot ihnsgt elik a raeyermcn or eyiuarrolvnto.
- If yeht are srdfine ihwt veeyr nvlgii rpelay adn hreti wni oninticod esnedpd no a agme occnonlusi ehnt yeht esncda.
wiki.article.standard.visit.title: Vstii
wiki.article.standard.visit.text:
Lsepray nca vstii eohtr lsepray ot seu hreti iltsiabie. Tlcliyayp, gnoshico a rpelay ihwt a loer lbtiiay saecsu uyo ot vstii eth econsh rpelay, tgholhau eterh are xoceeipnst
- Vtisis ehva danadlioti nnmiioftaro
    - Ritsovi (Rpelay)
    - Trgaet (Rpelay)
    - Ctniatgak (reut/easlf)
    - Tstparnro uiemmn (reut/easlf)
    - Asgtetviine uiemmn (reut/easlf)
    - Kowdrlbac uiemmn (reut/easlf)
    - Dticirne (reut/easlf)

 Hree are emso maelxspe fo ohw vtisis thimg owrk
- @7 is a Tcevetdei owh ehssooc @71, os @7 vtisis @71 adn lnrase a eutsrl batuo @71
 No eth esam ihtng @10 is a tuokool owh saol ehssooc @71. Os @10 lnrase ttha @7 sditeiv hreti trgaet.
- Eterh is vengaliti, owh ehssooc ot hsoot @03. Ta eth esam emit, eterh is an enngeeri owh sha hreti tapr est no @03. Eth nnegsreie tapr ilslk eth vengaliti ebauesc eth vengaliti is invtisig @03 ihwt an ctniatgak vstii
- A vtisis trgaet nca eb ncadehg utihtow eth ritsovi eenv onigwnk, rof eemalxp, eth iltsiabie fo Nretorsatpr, Repwar, adn Hitwc auces vtisis atretsg ot naecgh.
wiki.article.standard.target.title: Trgaet
wiki.article.standard.target.text:
Yoru trgaet is a rpelay owh uyo vstii.
- A vstii tgatriegn emoones nmeas ttha eth ritsovi is invtisig ttha rpelay.
wiki.article.standard.indirect.title: Dticirne
wiki.article.standard.indirect.text:
A vstii ttha is ieinibvils ot nyma iltsiabie.
 - Ti tseo'dn est ffo enngeeri rtpsa
 - Eth ritsovi 'nowt eb tekacatd yb a cpo, rhmeasub, rfewwleo, uimukaz, aevntre, lprisyko, or amrknmsa
 - Eth ritsovi 'nowt eb eusddo yb an srosnait
 - Ti 'nowt auces a nosop ot eb told t'nca ltle
wiki.article.standard.transportImmune.te:
A vstii ttha tseo'dn rgtreies ot tstparnro.
 Rof eemalxp: Nretorsatpr, Repwar, adn Treopr t'nca naecgh tstparnro uiemmn vtisis.
A vstii ttha tseo'dn rgtreies ot aiintvtigeves iltsiabie (fifedtrne mofr dticirne).
 - Eth sgopis, tuokool, tianfmonr, rfewwleo, adn ooj tseo'dn rgtreies iths vstii ni hreti aiintvtigeves urtesls (Eth rfewwleo itlls seserritg ti rof eth porupes fo lnkgili, tub ont rof inctagkr urtesls)
wiki.article.standard.wardblockImmune.te:
A vstii ttha is uiemmn ot adwr.
 - Iths vstii tseo'dn get blrcedwdkoa, eenv hwne sit trgaet is a eardwd rpelay.
wiki.article.standard.interview.title: Enietrwvi
wiki.article.standard.interview.text: A erroretp nca enietrwvi a rpelay rgnuid eth ihtng, ogwlialn eth erroretp ot kaeps ihwt temh. Eth rpelay egbni evditeewnir yma ont wonk owh eth erroretp is, tub rneeeyov sknwo eth erroretp is no eth ntwo eamt.
wiki.article.standard.report.title: Erprto
wiki.article.standard.report.text: Eth erroretp sha a erprto ciwhh is tepods ilylbupc veeyr rytoauib eth erroretp ehssooc ot. Rneeeyov sknwo eth erprto swa etirtwn yb eth erroretp os yeht wonk eth nnmiioftaro is wrtottushry. Eth erroretp yma enietrwvi a rpelay heca ihtng ot iagn nnmiioftaro ot lcduine ni eth erprto.
wiki.article.standard.forged.title: Orfeg
wiki.article.standard.forged.text: A rpelay owh is ferdgo had hreti ibila adn loer ncadehg yb eth roerfg no hreti eravg.
wiki.article.standard.hypnotize.title: Zhyetopni
wiki.article.standard.hypnotize.text: A rpelay owh is eoyhnitdzp swa a yphsontits trgaet. Yeht ylliepttnoa are told a fake seesmag mofr eth ntiyhspot. Yeht yma ehva neeb dkeoelorclb.
wiki.article.standard.frame.title: Efram
wiki.article.standard.frame.text: A rpelay owh is rafmed swa a seafrmr trgaet.
wiki.article.standard.convert.title: Revotcn
wiki.article.standard.convert.text:
A lre'spya loer is ncadehg. Lla fo hreti lbtiiay uses are feelirdl ot iummamx. fOr_ Eemalxp:_
- If emoones is needrvtco ot a Aevntre, yeht get lla etehr lbtiiay uses.
- An Solepta nca revotcn lsepray toni stltiucs.
wiki.article.standard.roleblock.title: Rloekocbl
wiki.article.standard.roleblock.text: A rpelay owh is dkeoelorclb sha hreti vtisis eadser. A lre'spya vtisis egbni eadser tfone nmeas yeht t'nca seu hreti lbtiiay. Emso sorle are uiemmn or ont defctafe yb egbni dkeoelorclb. Roects, Tosnocr, adn Ntiyhspot are sorle ttha nca rloekocbl eohtr lsepray adn are hotb uiemmn ot egbni dkeoelorclb.
wiki.article.standard.ward.title: Adwr
wiki.article.standard.ward.text:
Emoones nca eb eardwd. Aeonyn owh vtisis a rpelay owh is eardwd sha lla hreti vtisis eadser adn eisceevr a ahct seesmag sginya ttha yeht are blrcedwdkoa. fOr_ El_pemax:
- A ceunbro lsstece a rpelay ot adwr heca ihtng
- Eth orjlia stpu a rpelay ni ljai, irdwgan temh.

 Emso sorle are kowdrlbac uiemmn
- A tsejer nca klil emoones eenv if rhey'te eardwd
wiki.article.standard.block.title: Olbck
wiki.article.standard.block.text: A rpelay owh is celdobk swa teirhe dkeoelorclb, blrcedwdkoa, or hotb. A rpelay i'nst celdobk if rhey'te uiemmn.
wiki.article.standard.detain.title: Edtnia
wiki.article.standard.detain.text:
A rpelay owh is eentidda ta ihtng:
 - Is eardwd mofr lla vtisis.
 - Is dkeoelorclb.
 - Sha hreti lbtiiay deaacitvdet.
 - Temh adn hreti fwlleo srenisdi are told yeht are eentidda ta eth rsatt fo ihtng.
 - Yeht t'nca ahct ni hreti eniidrs orpug ahct rgnuid ihtng, tub nca itlls dear gmesasse mofr ti.

Emso maelxspe fo sorle ttha nca edtnia lsepray are: Orjlia, adn Kippradne.
Wdaern seod ont edtnia lsepray.
wiki.article.standard.rampage.title: Gpaerma
wiki.article.standard.rampage.text: Lla viirssto ot a apadgrem rpelay are tekacatd. Eth gpaerma hsares eth ctkata vleel fo eth arpgamgni caaterhcr.
wiki.article.standard.possess.title: Essposs
wiki.article.standard.possess.text:
A rpelay nca eb esesospds toni theonra rpelay, nfgcori temh ot seu hreti lbtiiay a atincre ayw.
- Esesospds lsepray are told yeht are esesospds tub ont told owh yeht are esesospds toni, onr are yeht told ahwt hreti lbtiiay is drefco toni diogn.
- Iltsiabie t'nca eb drefco toni mhgsteoni ttha yeht tlcliyayp t'nca do (ie, a tcevetdei atnnoc eb drefco ot asgtetviine etlmsehf, ebauesc a tcevetdei is ont eabl ot asgtetviine vehsetmsel tlcliyayp)
- Emso iltsiabie are uiemmn ot ssopsnsieo, tub yeht are itlls told yeht are esesospds.

Iths is ohw heca lrelontrco peyt is fefeectd hwne uyo are esesospds:
- Ckoxhbce: If uyo are esesospds toni resluyfo, eth box is fceor chdecke, etirheosw nihognt ahsepnp.
- Rpelay Slti: Eth slti fo lsepray (or eth esginl rpelay sotl) is est ot coitnna ynol eth rpelay uyo are esesospds toni.
- Txclaey Tow Lsepray: Eth fitsr rpelay ceohic is est ot eth rpelay uyo are esesospds toni, tub eth coesdn rpelay ceohic stsay as ahwt ti swa yrlnaiogil est ot.

 Lla edntuisl errtlsonloc are fceneutdef yb ssopsnsieo. Errtlsonloc t'nca eb est ot an ailnidv ceohic.
wiki.article.standard.defense.title: Fdeenes
wiki.article.standard.defense.text:
Aktatcs adn fdeenes ehva 3 siter heca. An ctkata nca teirhe eb absic, mrpga-rciroeni, or iirppotecogerintc-n.

A fdeenes nca teirhe eb arredom, eectdprot, or envbilniic.

A absic ctkata nca ont klil a rpelay owh is arredom, adn an mrpga-rciroeni ctkata nca ont klil a rpelay owh is eectdprot. A iirppotecogerintc-n ctkata nca eowrvrepo oamrr as well as pooencrtti.

 Emso sorle ehva oamrr yb feldatu, yslauul veil osne. Pooencrtti nca eb naergtd ot lsepray ohhgutr iltsiabie elik eth Sd'otcor lbtiiay ot dagru hreti trgaet. A rpelay ihwt envbilniic fdeenes nca ynol eid yb ggtetin euctdexe or nievalg eth agme.

Lunsse etirheosw ieddtacin, aktatcs are absic yb feldatu adn lliw ont eb eabl ot klil lsepray owh are arredom or eectdprot.
wiki.article.standard.guard.title: Dagru
wiki.article.standard.guard.text:
A rpelay nca dagru theonra rpelay
- Eth dedagru rpelay sha eectdprot fdeenes rof eth ihtng.
- If eth dedagru rpelay is tekacatd:
    - Eth dedagru rpelay is told yeht ehva neeb dedagru mofr ta astel eon ctkata.
    - Eth rpelay owh is gugdnari eth dedagru rpelay is told yeht dedagru a rpelay mofr ta astel eon ctkata.
wiki.article.standard.fragileVest.title: Feialrg Tves
wiki.article.standard.fragileVest.text:
A rpelay ihwt a feialrg tves sha fdeenes nilut yeht are tekacatd rgnuid miithndg.
 - A rpelay nca ehva lmitleup feialrg vsets ta eocn
 - Heca tves esvig a fifedtrne fdeenes prewo.
 - A tves ksbrea no eth ihtng eth rpelay ihwt eth tves is tekacatd
 - Heca tves ocsem ihwt a est fo lsepray, heets lsepray are told hwne eth tves ksbrea. Eth rpelay owh sha eth tves is ont esyalcneisr told ttha yeht ehva a tves or ttha eth tves kbeor.
wiki.article.standard.enfranchise.title: Fncineahres
wiki.article.standard.enfranchise.text:
- Hwne a rpelay escfnsaheinr ihwt prewo X.
    - Yeht sgte X txare oesvt rgnuid veeyr inmntanooi adn tedgumjen.
    - Yeht iagn eth cnasdiefrhne tga, wongshi lla lsepray ttha yeht cnasdiefrhne.
 - Hwne a rpelay annuessfihernc
    - Hreti sleo hreti txare oesvt envgi yb fncineahres.
    - Yeht sleo hreti cnasdiefrhne tga, lla lsepray ni eth boylb ees ttha yeht are ont cnasdiefrhne aoreymn.
wiki.article.standard.dead.title: Aedd
wiki.article.standard.dead.text:
Hwne a rpelay deis:
- Hreti eravg is eaddd ot eth aagvrdrye

Helwi a rpelay is aedd:
- Msot fo hreti iltsiabie od'nt owrk
- Yeht t'nca ovet
- Yeht t'nca ahct ni lla ahct
- Yeht nca ahct ni aedd ahct.
wiki.article.standard.randomSeed.title: Dnarmo Edes
wiki.article.standard.randomSeed.text: Edes rof dnarmo nmebru eoreatnrg. If tpnnedeinde gsmae fo miithndg ischatoniamn ehva eth esam edes, adn sstgetni, adn lla lsepray mkae eth esam dnssieoci ni eth esam rdeor, eth gsmae lliw ypal uto aiiclyednlt. If no edes is pfiecsdie, a dnarmo edes is econsh ta eth rsatt fo eth agme.
wiki.article.standard.silenced.title: Sniceel
wiki.article.standard.silenced.text:
A rpelay owh is enldeisc nca ont alkt or etirheosw amocmtcnuie rgnuid ttha ayd.
- Yeht nca itlls ovet rgnuid eth tedgumjen eapsh
- If eth enldeisc rpelay is tpu no railt, yeht itlls t'nca alkt
- If eth lsepray are laingkt uto olud, enldeisc lsepray hodsul ont kaeps or seu yan peyt fo oonincuctmmia, gludnicin lsnsagi or ciflaa rssispexeno. Eth eulr is, fo a rpelay t'nca seu ahct, yeht are ont dleowla ot amocmtcnuie
- Sorle elik eupdyt yramo adn orjlia nca itlls seu hreti iltsiabie mlornlay rgnuid eth ayd eenv if enldeisc

 A Iacraebllkm nca sniceel a rpelay heca ihtng.
wiki.article.standard.friends.title: Srdfine
wiki.article.standard.friends.text:
If 2 lsepray nca wni eth esam agme, yeht are srdfine.
 - A tsejer nca wni ni eth esam agme as a tcevetdei, os yeht are srdfine
- An Solepta nca wni ni eth esam agme as a cdepiils os yeht are srdfine
- A rfaheodtg t'nca wni ni eth esam agme as a tcevetdei, yeht hotb deen eth eohtr ot sleo, os yeht are simneee
- A aetoeintrm is srdfine ihwt a prteeupep adn simneee ihwt a eduimm
 Eth ppsehohorli, tcevetdei, adn sgopis, nca seu hreti iltsiabie ot ees if pleeop are srdfine or simneee, tgholhau uaasr nca etfcfe heets urtesls.

 A rpelay nca saol eb srdfine ihwt ciossncnulo. If uyo nca wni ihwt ntwo ehnt uyo are srdfine ihwt ntwo, rof eemalxp, a tcevetdei is srdfine ihwt ntwo tub simneee ihwt inctadesy.
wiki.article.standard.enemies.title: Simneee
wiki.article.standard.enemies.text:
If 2 lsepray deen eth eohtr ot sleo ni rdeor rof vehsetmsel ot wni, yeht are simneee.
- A Litpoicina t'nca wni nlsdgoiea a yramo, os yeht are simneee.
- A rfaheodtg t'nca wni ni eth esam agme as a orjlia, os yeht are simneee.
- A tsejer nca wni ni eth esam agme as a tcevetdei, os yeht are srdfine.
- An Solepta t'nca wni ihwt a rfaheodtg, os yeht are simneee.

 Eth ppsehohorli, tcevetdei, adn sgopis, nca seu hreti iltsiabie ot ees if pleeop are srdfine or simneee, tgholhau uaasr nca etfcfe heets urtesls.
wiki.article.standard.loyalist.title: Lylasiot
wiki.article.standard.loyalist.text:
A rpelay owh is a lylasiot nwis if adn ynol if eth occnonlusi hreti aolyl ot is cehrdae.
 - A Tcevetdei is yslauul a ntwo lylasiot
 -  A Tsejer is yslauul ont aolyl ot yan wni oninticod, hreti wni oninticod is tpnnedeinde, (Eenv if yeht are srdfine ihwt ntwo, yeht 'terna a ntwo lylasiot).

 Lsepray owh are aolyl ot fifedtrne ciossncnulo usmt eb simneee.
 Lsepray nca ynol eb aolyl ot agme ciossncnulo
 - "Tsejer" i'nst a occnonlusi os eterh is no "Tsejer Lylasiot".
wiki.article.standard.insider.title: Eniidrs
wiki.article.standard.insider.text:
An eniidrs orpug is a orpug fo lsepray owh ehva eth loinolgfw eeiptrspor
 - Yeht ehva eth loer fo lla eohtr nvlgii srenisdi ni hreti orpug elrdeaev ot temh
 - Yeht ehva a ahct orpug ihwt lla eohtr srenisdi.
    - Rgnuid ihtng adn rytoauib, lla srenisdi nca dnes ni eth eniidrs orpug ahct, eenv if aedd.
Emso maelxspe fo eniidrs puorsg are:
    - Inctadesy
    - Utcl
    - Prteeupep

 Rof eemalxp, A caitlpy Aifomso is a Inctadesy Eniidrs, yeht ehva eth sorle fo lla inctadesy srenisdi elrdeaev adn nca alkt ot temh ta ihtng.
wiki.article.standard.conclusion.title: Occnonlusi
wiki.article.standard.conclusion.text:
Eth agme ynol dnes hwne a occnonlusi is deceddi. Msot lsepray wni niintsdooc lliw edpend no eth occnonlusi deceddi.
- Emso maelxspe fo ciossncnulo are:
    - Ntwo
    - Inctadesy
    - Utcl
    - Isndef
    - Icne Slti
    - Arwd

- A agme occnonlusi is tdnmieeder gcrcoiand ot eth loinolgfw lesru
    - If lla lsepray owh are *dtneocu rof eth agme occnonlusi eckhc* are srdfine ihwt a occnonlusi, ttha occnonlusi nwis.
        - If eterh are no lsepray egnimainr, eth agme dnes ni a arwd
    - A rpelay is ynol *dtneocu rof eth agme occnonlusi eckhc* if yan fo eth loinolgfw is reut
        - Hreti loer is ni eth inctadesy lnkgili loer est, or hreti loer is ni eth isndef loer est
        - Yeht are a ntwo lylasiot
        - Yeht are a inctadesy eniidrs
wiki.article.standard.role.title: Loer
wiki.article.standard.role.text:
Veeyr rpelay sha a loer. Hreti loer iedsneemrt ahwt hreti lbtiiay is.
 ofR__ eemalxp:__ Aifomso is a loer ihwt eth lbtiiay ot klil a rpelay heca ihtng.
 Yb feldatu, a Loer iedsneemrt ahwt a lsepray wni oninticod is, adn ahwt yeht puorsg yeht are srenisdi ni. Evhewor, iths nca naecgh ued ihnsgt uchs as prteeupep gihgcann a lsepray wni oninticod tub ont hreti loer.
wiki.article.standard.haunt.title: Hnatu
wiki.article.standard.haunt.text: Refat yeht eid, a Eduimm nca hnatu a nvlgii rpelay ot woall temh ot amocmtcnuie ihwt eth aedd rgnuid eth ihtng. Eth huentda rpelay is eaddd ot eth aedd ahct orpug ta ihtng. If lmitleup mmiudse hnatu lmitleup lsepray, yeht nca lla kaeps ihwt heca eohtr adn lla aedd lsepray.
wiki.article.standard.transport.title: Tstparnro
wiki.article.standard.transport.text:
Ta miithndg, lsepray nca eb aprstetndor. Hwne a rpelay is aprstetndor:
- Eth aprstetndor rpelay is told yeht are aprstetndor.
- Lla vtisis ot eth aprstetndor rpelay are edetdcrrei ot theonra rpelay.

Eon tstparnro lbtiiay nca tstparnro lmitleup lsepray.
- A vstii nca ont eb aprstetndor yb a esginl lbtiiay emro hatn eocn.

Heca lbtiiay ttha saecsu a tstparnro ahsepnp ihwt a fifedtrne orpstoaiti-ryrrntp, iltsiabie ihwt a wlreo orpstoaiti-ryrrntp nca ont etfcfe eth vtisis aatsediocs ihwt srntoatspr fo an aluqe or gihehr orpstoaiti-ryrrntp. Eth toiirprise are:
 - Nretorsatpr
 - Repwar / Treopr / Hoaylptm 
 - Dguoabdyr

Iths nmeas repwar adn Treopr nca ont etfcfe eth vtisis fo vehsetmsel, hachortee, or eth nretorsatpr. Evhewor, eth nretorsatpr nca etfcfe eth vtisis fo eth repwar, treopr, adn dguoabdyr.
wiki.article.standard.obscured.title: Sorubce
wiki.article.standard.obscured.text: A rpelay owh is rsceubod had hreti loer adn ibila eadser mofr hreti eravg. A Nmiactroi nca tga lsepray rof oisrungcb, ehnt hwne yeht eid, yeht are rsceubod.
wiki.article.standard.evil.title: Veil
wiki.article.standard.evil.text: If a loer is veil, ti nmeas a loer is t-ononnw. A pcscyhi nca ivercee veil osnivsi ot lnera owh is ont no ntwo. A tcevetdei lliw ees emoones as ispuiossuc if yeht are veil or ehva a ispuiossuc raua.
wiki.article.standard.roleLimit.title: Loer Ilmit
wiki.article.standard.roleLimit.text:
A sorle ilmit is eth iummamx nmebru fo ttha loer ttha nca eb rtaegeden ta eth rsatt fo a rgraleu agme. If eterh is no ilmit, eterh nca eb yan nmebru fo ttha loer.
- Aevntre sha a loer ilmit fo 1, eterh nca ynol eb eon aevntre, if 2 pleeop mailc aevntre, eon usmt eb nligy
- Rdcwiadl usmt edaher ot loer ilmit
wiki.article.standard.douse.title: Oesud
wiki.article.standard.douse.text: Rssoasitn nca oesud lsepray, ehnt aetlr iegnit, ot ctkata rneeeyov owh is eusddo. If eterh is an srosnait evali ehnt eusddo lsepray ehva a ispuiossuc raua. Inntiigg is an iirppotecogerintc-n ctkata ot lla eusddo lsepray ttha seod ont vstii.
wiki.article.standard.spiral.title: Rsilap
wiki.article.standard.spiral.text: UIMUKAZ nca ntiuefaat lsepray, ciwhh saecsu temh ot rsilap. Ngrailisp lsepray are ont told yeht are ngrailisp, adn yeht eid eth tenx ihtng. Viirssto ot ngrailisp lsepray rsatt ot rsilap. Gdiyn ued ot ngrailisp is an mrpga-rciroeni ctkata.
wiki.article.standard.backup.title: Upkcab
wiki.article.standard.backup.text:
Eth inctadesy nca escooh a rpelay ot eb eth upkcab. If lla eth inctadesy lnkgili iltsiabie are celdobk, ehnt eth upkcab aktatcs hreti trgaet indsate indsate.
- Eth upkcab nca teslec a fifedtrne trgaet mofr eth eohtr lnkgili lbtiiay
- Eth eohtr lnkgili lbtiiay udocl eb a inctadesy lnkgili loer or a rpelay ihwt eth ugn
wiki.article.standard.confused.title: Uncseofd
wiki.article.standard.confused.text:
Eth loer fo a rpelay owh is uncseofd thimg ont cnntuoif lrecyotrc. Uncseofd eastcff heca loer eyrefnlitdf. Uyo thimg ont eb told ttha uyo are uncseofd.
 Ohw iths eastcff veeyr loer:
   - Nosop: Uyo are saawyl told ttha uyo t'nca ltle
   - Tcevetdei: Uyo are saawyl told oitnncen
   - Ppsehohorli: Uyo are saawyl told srdfine
   - Sgopis: Uyo are saawyl told ttha yoru trgaet did'tn vstii an yeenm
   - Pcscyhi: Uyo are told a dnarmo slti fo 3 lsepray rof yoru veil ionsiv, Uyo are told a dnarmo slti fo 2 lsepray rof yoru ogdo ionsiv.
 - Lytal Eklrc: Uyo are told teirhe 1 emro or 1 lses hatn eth rcrtceo nmebru uyo hodsul eb told. If ti ulwdo eecedx eth nmebru fo lsepray owh tdove uytigl, ti is ttha nmebru indsate. If ti reew ot go erndu 0, ti is 0 indsate.
 - Oautidr: Uyo get dnarmo sorle, yeht thimg eb rcrtceo or enirtocrc. Uyo are ynol told sorle ttha udocl ehva oemc mofr ttha sotl.
wiki.article.standard.marionette.title: Rtnisg Pu
wiki.article.standard.marionette.text:
A rpelay owh is a aetoeintrm sha ejniod a fifedtrne eamt
- Yeht peke hreti dol loer hwne yeht ecboem a aetoeintrm
- Yeht are tekacatd veeyr ihtng yb eth loer ttha teidcreur temh ihwt a pooencrtti grnepici ctkata(EX. Ueretcirr or Prteeupep)
- If eterh are no lsepray ihwt eth loer ttha teidcreur temh, eth aetoeintrm is itlls tekacatd
- Eth aetoeintrm no lenogr nwis ihwt hreti garioinl eamt tub nwis ihwt eth nwe eamt indsate
wiki.article.standard.aura.title: Raua
wiki.article.standard.aura.text:
An raua is a atstus etfcfe tpu no a rpelay ttha saecsu temh ot rgtreies eyrefnlitdf ot aiintvtigeves iltsiabie.
 - Rof eemalxp, a Tcevetdei ssee yan lsepray ihwt a ispuiossuc raua as simneee ot ntwo, eenv if yeht are srdfine ihwt ntwo
 - Ot wonk ohw oitnncen raua or ispuiossuc raua thimg etfcfe an lbtiiay, ot go eth lunmaa paeg rof ttha loer.

 Hree are maelxspe fo iltsiabie ttha thimg auces a rpelay ot ehva an raua.
 - Afemrr esvig a rpelay ispuiossuc raua rof a ihtng
 - Gadrstehfo ehva an oitnncen raua, eenv if rhey'te dkeoelorclb
 - Iisedgsur nca gvie a rpelay an oitnncen raua rof eon ihtng

If a rpelay sha hotb an oitnncen adn ispuiossuc raua ta eth esam emit, eth ispuiossuc raua *yslauul* odsreeirv.
 - A rpelay ihwt an oitnncen raua adn a ispuiossuc raua seserritg as simneee ihwt ntwo gcrcoiand ot a tcevetdei
wiki.article.standard.appearedVisit.text:
Emso sorle get loefdo yb dpaapere vtisis tarcede yb eohtr sorle.
 - A afemrr nca mkae a rpelay ot eaparp ot vstii eohtr lsepray.
 - If a afemrr easkm uyo eaparp ot vstii lsepray, ehnt uyo ynol eaparp ot vstii toehs lsepray (adn ont eth lsepray uyo are clayltau invtisig)
wiki.article.standard.roleOutline.title: Loer Lnoutie
wiki.article.standard.roleOutline.text:
A loer lnoutie esnifed a orpug fo sorle.

Sutoienl nca teirhe eb a fiedneredp loer est, an etcxa loer, or a onnui fo lmitleup.

_P_laxesem

"Yan" Ti udocl eb yan loer

"Uanterl" Udocl eb yan sopesilb uanterl loer.

"Ntwo Pousprt" Udocl eb an Roects, Eduimm, Nretorsatpr, etc.

"Rfaheodtg" Udocl ynol eb a Rfaheodtg.

"Rdcwiadl or Pcscyhi" Udocl teirhe eb an Rdcwiadl or Pcscyhi.

- Hwne sorle are rtaegeden nrloadmy mofr a loer lnoutie, heca sopesilb loer is aluqely llkeiy ot tenegare.
- Loer sutoienl are sued ni eth lnoutie slti ot swoh ahwt sorle udocl eb ni eth agme.
wiki.article.standard.outlineList.title: Lnoutie Slti
wiki.article.standard.outlineList.text:
Eth lnoutie slti esnifed ahwt sorle are ni eth agme. Hwne eth agme atrsst:
- Heca loer lnoutie eegantesr a dnarmo loer mofr eth sorle ni eth lnoutie
- Heca rpelay is eanissgd ot a loer lnoutie, adn hrtoeeefr a loer.
wiki.article.standard.chatGroup.title: Ahct Orpug
wiki.article.standard.chatGroup.text:
Lla gmesasse are teirhe ievaprt or tesn eon fo heets ahct puorsg
 - Lla 🔊 (Eth onic tseo'dn yspdlia tenx ot gmesasse, Uyo are dleowla ot kaeps uto olud if uyo nca dnes ot "Lla" ahct) 
 - Aedd 💀
 - Inctadesy 🌹
 - Utcl 🕯️
 - Ljai 🔒
 - Enietrwvi 📝

 Lsepray nca eb ni lmitleup ahct puorsg ta eocn, or eenv dear ahct puorsg yeht are ont ni.
 - 🔇 Nmeas uyo are ont ni eth "Lla" ahct orpug adn are *ont dleowla ot kaeps uto olud*
 - 🔮 nmeas ttha a nvlgii rpelay tesn a seesmag ot eth aedd ahct orpug
 - ✉️ nmeas ttha eth seesmag swa tesn aprlevyit
wiki.article.standard.fastForward.title: Satf Fwardor
wiki.article.standard.fastForward.text: If lla nvlgii lsepray ovet ot satf fwardor, eth nrrcute eapsh ylttninsa dnes. Otnvgi ot satf fwardor is mcotplyeel onnysauom, noybod eenv sknwo hwne uyo psesr eth ntbout. Ot ovet ot satf fwardor, noep eth satf fwardor rpdo donw ni eth tpo tlfe. Uyo nca teirhe escooh ot satf fwardor eth nrrcute eapsh, or ot satf fwardor ot a cscepfii eapsh.
wiki.article.standard.told.title: Told
wiki.article.standard.told.text: If uyo are told mhgsteoni, uyo reew tesn a ahct seesmag sattnig ti.
wiki.article.standard.howToPlay.title: Ohw Ot Ypal
wiki.article.standard.howToPlay.text:
Eth galo fo eth agme esnedpd no yoru loer. Msot sorle wni if lla lsepray mofr inpgopso esatm are mneedtiila
Eth esatm are Ntwo, Inctadesy, Utcl, Isndef
- Ntwo hodsul try ot difn uto owh eth inctadesy is ni rdeor ot ovet temh uto
- Inctadesy, utcl, adn isndef, hodsul try ot tysa hidnde helwi lnkgili eistnwo

Eth agme nrsu ni sespah fo ayd adn ihtng
- Rgnuid ihtng, heca rpelay uses hreti sorle iltsiabie
- Rgnuid eth ayd, lsepray csiusds nnmiioftaro yeht lerande adn ovet no a rpelay ot klil

Eterh are usashbsep hinwti ayd adn ihtng

# Ihtng
Msot loer iltsiabie owrk ta ihtng. Hree are emso maelxspe
- Heca ihtng, eth rfaheodtg nca teslec a rpelay ot klil temh
- Heca ihtng, eth tcevetdei nca teslec a rpelay. Eth tcevetdei is told if eth rpelay yeht teslec is oitnncen or ispuiossuc. Iths ulwdo lphe eth tcevetdei difn uto owh eth inctadesy is. If yeht are ispuiossuc yeht are a ntwo yeenm
- Heca ihtng, eth afemrr nca teslec a rpelay ot mkae temh rgtreies seyafll ot eth tcevetdei. Os a wiento udocl rgtreies as ispuiossuc ot a tcevetdei seyafll if a afemrr sued hreti lbtiiay

# Rytoauib
Rgnuid eth rytoauib eapsh, rneeeyov is told owh ided, nlgao ihwt eth loer adn ibila fo toehs owh ided.
Lla lsepray hodsul peke hreti ibila teon paeg ot peke ktrca fo lla eth nnmiioftaro yeht lerande rgnuid eth agme. Eth rytoauib eapsh is a ercftpe emit ot ewitr donw ni yoru ibila ahwt uyo lerande slta ihtng. Rof eemalxp:

- If uoe'yr a tcevetdei owh lerande ttha @5 is ispuiossuc no ihtng 1. Uyo udocl ewitr yoru ibila ot okol elik iths

Tcevetdei
Ihtng 1: @5 - ispuiossuc

Ti is saol naiorpmtt rof onn wiento lsepray ot peke a fake ibila ot pedrtne ttha yeht are a wiento

# Indsocsusi
Eth indsocsusi eapsh is ehrwe lsepray csiusds eth nnmiioftaro yeht lerande adn try ot difn uto owh eth inctadesy, isndef, adn utcl are
Lsepray lliw ask heca eohtr ot mailc, iths nmeas yeht twna ot wonk eth nnmiioftaro ttha eth eohtr rpelay lerande
Msot lsepray dnes hreti ibila ni ahct rgnuid iths eapsh, ot earhs eth nnmiioftaro ytieilfecfn ni nresopes ot egbni ekdas ot mailc. Ti lliw llkeiy eb drdesnocie ispuiossuc ot ont ehva an ibila eerrpapd hwne ekdas rof eon. Os sit rvey naiorpmtt ot ehva eon eerrpapd, no etrtam owh uyo are

# Inmntanooi
Rgnuid inmntanooi, lsepray nca ovet eohtr lsepray no ot railt ni rdeor ot eeeuctx temh
Eth tbse ayw rof eistnwo ot klil inctadesy meremsb is ot seu hreti ovet, eenv if uyo rena’t atincre emoones is veil, otnvgi temh tnoo railt adn thganrienet temh lliw tfone gvie nnmiioftaro ot lphe difn inctadesy
- If emro hatn lfha fo eth nvlgii lsepray ovet rof eon rpelay, ttha rpelay is tpu no railt
- If eterh rena’t ghuneo oesvt ni emit, eth agme sipks rcltidey ot skdu

# Osytmtnie
- Eth rpelay tdove no iralt is eth ynol rpelay dleowla ot kaeps adn ahct rgnuid iths eapsh, yeht hodsul alnirecyt mailc, dnes hreti ibila adn sya ahwt hreti loer is

# Tedgumjen
- Rneeeyov oesvt oitnncen or uytigl (or nbstasia)
- If emro lsepray ovet uytigl hatn oitnncen, eth rpelay no railt lliw eb euctdexe
- If eth rpelay no railt isn’t euctdexe, eterh is theonra iralt (ihwt a axm fo etehr)

# Lniaf wdsor
- Eth rpelay owh swa no railt hodsul eb dleowla ot sya emso lniaf wdsor or otnse yeht ehva rof eth ntwo

# Skdu
- A epitghr-n eapsh rof rneeeyov ot get a slta drwo ni bfeero eth tenx ihtng

# Lniaf oshtguht
Eth agme nrsu ni iths lpoo nilut eterh is eon eamt egnimainr
Eth miithndg lunmaa sha a slti fo lla sorle adn hreti iltsiabie. Ti is emercmdnoed ot dear pu no yoru loer rgnuid eth bnienigng nebifrgi eapsh
If yoru veil, uyo hodsul try ot lnera ohw ta astel eon wiento loer kwsro os uyo nca pedrtne ot eb ttha loer
Uanterl sorle lla ehva fifedtrne wni niintsdooc adn are ont no a eamt. Rof eemalxp: Tsejer nwis if yeht are tdove uto rgnuid a iralt
wiki.article.standard.briefing.title: Nebifrgi
wiki.article.standard.briefing.text:
Nebifrgi is tlcliyayp eth fitsr eapsh fo eth agme.

Rgnuid nebifrgi, lsepray:
* Tlcliyayp dear eth miithndg lunmaa ot gfireu uto ohw hreti loer kwsro.
* If yeht ehva emit, iths is saol a ogdo trnoupoipty ot rsatt initrgw an ibila or rsatt ighinntk fo plsna rof eth agme.
* If yeht are veil, yma saol try ot saol lnera ohw ta astel eon wiento loer kwsro os yeht nca pedrtne ot eb ttha loer.
* Psesr eth satf fwardor ntbout ni eth tpo tlfe fo eth crnsee eocn yeht are dneo rndaeig eth lunmaa, ni rdeor ot rsatt eth agme kqcurei.

Eth miithndg lunmaa sha a slti fo lla sorle adn hreti iltsiabie, os ti is emercmdnoed ot kate iths emit ot dear pu no yoru loer adn yan eohtr nnmiioftaro uyo lliw deen ot ypal leveceftyfi.

Eth fitsr eapsh refat nebifrgi is Skdu.
wiki.article.standard.night.title: Ihtng
wiki.article.standard.night.text:
Eth Ihtng eapsh ocsem refat Skdu. Ti is tlcliyayp hwne msot lsepray ehva ot seu hreti loer iltsiabie.

Rof eemalxp:
- Heca ihtng, eth tcevetdei ehssooc a rpelay ot asgtetviine
- Heca ihtng ecexpt eth fitsr, eth rpelay ihwt eth inctadesy ugn nca escooh ot hsoot a rpelay.
- Msot eohtr sorle saol seu hreti iltsiabie ta ihtng as well.

Refat vgiahn emda hreti niceelstso rgnuid ihtng, eth urtesls fo a lre'spya iltsiabie adn eth ihnsgt ttha nahppe ot temh lliw eb sohnw ta eth rsatt fo eth tenx eapsh, Rytoauib.
wiki.article.standard.obituary.title: Rytoauib
wiki.article.standard.obituary.text:
Rytoauib ocsem refat eth nteevs fo ihtng.

Rgnuid eth rytoauib eapsh, rneeeyov is told owh ided, nlgao ihwt eth loer adn ibila fo toehs owh ided.
Rgnuid rytoauib, lsepray atnnoc kaeps ot heca eohtr, ciwhh easkm ti a ogdo trnoupoipty rof lsepray ot eupatd hreti ibila teon paeg ihwt eth nnmiioftaro yeht lerande rgnuid eth agme.

Rof eemalxp:
- A tcevetdei owh lerande ttha @5 is ispuiossuc no ihtng 1, ulwdo tpu ttha nnmiioftaro ni hreti ibila.
- A rpelay owh swa tekacatd adn eectdprot ulwdo teon ttha ni hreti ibila as well.
- A rpelay owh swa dkeoelorclb hodsul teon ttha as well, os eohtr lsepray 'terna ispuiossuc hwy yeht tan'veh etngot yan nnmiioftaro.
- An veil rpelay esned ot fake eth nnmiioftaro yeht eeidcver, os rgnuid iths emit yeht ehva eth trnoupoipty ot oemc pu ihwt a alnp adn ewitr hreti fake nnmiioftaro ni hreti ibila ot lofo eohtr lsepray.

Refat rytoauib, eth ayd atrsst ihwt eth indsocsusi eapsh.
wiki.article.standard.discussion.title: Indsocsusi
wiki.article.standard.discussion.text:
Eth indsocsusi eapsh ocsem refat rytoauib.

Rgnuid indsocsusi, lsepray csiusds eth nnmiioftaro yeht lerande adn try ot difn uto owh eth inctadesy, isndef, adn utcl are.
Lsepray lliw ask heca eohtr ot mailc. Iths nmeas yeht twna ot wonk eth nnmiioftaro ttha eth eohtr rpelay lerande.
Msot lsepray dnes hreti ibila ni ahct rgnuid iths eapsh ni rdeor ot earhs hreti wolhe mailc ytieilfecfn. Lsepray utihtow a eerrpapd ibila nedt ot esme ispuiossuc, os tis' rvey naiorpmtt ot ehva eon eerrpapd, no etrtam owh uyo are.

Refat indsocsusi ocsem eth inmntanooi eapsh.
wiki.article.standard.nomination.title: Inmntanooi
wiki.article.standard.nomination.text:
Eth inmntanooi eapsh ocsem refat eth indsocsusi eapsh.

Rgnuid inmntanooi, lsepray nca ovet eohtr lsepray no ot railt ni rdeor ot eeeuctx temh.
Eth tbse ayw rof eistnwo ot klil inctadesy meremsb is ot seu hreti ovet:
- Eenv if uyo 'terna atincre emoones is veil, otnvgi temh tnoo railt as a teatrh lliw tfone nnvoecci temh ot gvie nnmiioftaro (or, if yeht reew veil, ot try ot oemc pu ihwt a fdeenes).
- Tlcliyayp, if emro hatn lfha fo eth nvlgii lsepray ovet rof eon rpelay, ttha rpelay is tpu no railt adn envgi a osytmtnie eapsh ot ianexpl vehsetmsel.

If eterh rena’t ghuneo oesvt ot rsatt a railt ni emit, eth agme sipks rcltidey ot eth skdu eapsh.
wiki.article.standard.adjournment.title: Aretdnjmoun
wiki.article.standard.adjournment.text: Eth Aretdnjmoun eapsh ocsem refat inmntanooi ynol if eterh swa no rpelay maneontid. Ti aserlcpe eth railt ttha swa smieds.
wiki.article.standard.testimony.title: Osytmtnie
wiki.article.standard.testimony.text:
Eth Osytmtnie eapsh uosrcc hwne a rpelay is tdove ot railt rgnuid inmntanooi.

Eth rpelay no railt:
- Is eth ynol rpelay dleowla ot kaeps adn ahct rgnuid iths eapsh.
- Hodsul llkeiy mailc, dnes hreti ibila adn sya ahwt hreti loer is if yeht od'nt twna ot eb tdove uto.
- Eietmsmos, pieslceyal if yeht are veil, hodsul try ot tpu rpsseuer no theonra rpelay ot try ot get temh tdove uto indsate.

Tymrtaoinpl, egbni tdove uto seod ont mkae a rpelay sleo, adn eietmsmos eth tbse uocers fo cnaoti is ot ovet uto a ogdo rpelay.

Refat a lre'spya osytmtnie ocsem eth tedgumjen eapsh.
wiki.article.standard.judgement.title: Tedgumjen
wiki.article.standard.judgement.text:
Eth Tedgumjen eapsh fwsolol eth osytmtnie eapsh.

Rgnuid eth Tedgumjen eapsh:

- Rneeeyov oesvt ehwerht eth rpelay no railt is oitnncen or uytigl
- If emro lsepray ovet uytigl hatn oitnncen, eth rpelay no railt lliw eb envgi a lniaf wdsor eapsh as eon slta trnoupoipty ot kaeps.
- If eth rpelay no railt is indsate tdove oitnncen, eth agme lliw trurne ot eth inmntanooi eapsh if eterh are emro alisrt, etirheosw ti lliw oecrped ot skdu.
wiki.article.standard.finalWords.title: Lniaf Wdsor
wiki.article.standard.finalWords.text:
Eth Lniaf Wdsor eapsh uosrcc refat a Jtmnegdu eapsh hwne eth rpelay no railt is ndouf uytigl.

Rgnuid lniaf wdsor:
- Lla lsepray nca kaeps.
- Eth rpelay no railt owh is batuo ot eid nca earhs hreti slta oshtguht.

Ta eth ned fo lniaf wdsor, eth rpelay no railt is llikde yb uictnoxee, adn eth agme pdcesoer ot skdu.
wiki.article.standard.dusk.title: Skdu
wiki.article.standard.dusk.text:
Skdu is eth slta eapsh ciwhh uosrcc rgnuid eth ayd. Ti is eth slta trnoupoipty ot get a drwo ni or earhs nnmiioftaro bfeero Ihtng atrsst.

Eocn eth nebifrgi eapsh is reov, iths is eth fitsr eapsh fo eth agme.
wiki.article.standard.priority.title: Rioiprty
wiki.article.standard.priority.text:
Ta eth ned fo ihtng nyma iltsiabie nahppe ta lyrane eth esam emit. Yeht nahppe ni a cscepfii rdeor ledcla rioiprty. Onigwnk eth rdeor fo emso ihnsgt nca lphe sndtnndgarieu fo emso agme emscahicn.

wiki.article.standard.chat.text:
Eth ahct is ehrwe lsepray ivercee msot nnmiioftaro.
- Hwne ihtng dnes, eth ahct lliw swoh if uyo reew tekacatd, dkeoelorclb, aprstetndor adn uhcm emro.
- Yslauul, lsepray t'nca dnes gmesasse ta ihtng, tub emso sorle nca.
- Ont lla gmesasse nca eb enes yb rneeeyov, rnalom gmesasse ehva ocins ttha retnseper ahwt ahct orpug eth seesmag swa tesn ni.

wiki.article.standard.alibi.title: Ibila
wiki.article.standard.alibi.text:
Ni rdeor ot difn uto owh eth inctadesy is, eistnwo deen ot earhs nnmiioftaro yeht ehva ni rdeor ot edudec owh is nligy batuo hreti loer. Iths is dneo ihwt eth seu fo iibals, ciwhh are ocserdr fo eth iltsiabie uyo ehva sued adn nnmiioftaro uyo ehva tdeegrha. Iibals are tepods ni eth ahct adn aagvrdrye hwne eth rpelay deis. Hree is an eemalxp fo a caitlpy ibila ttha a Tcevetdei ulwdo ehva.

> Tcevetdei
Ihtng 1: Ddetoa Anoslw - Oitnncen
Ihtng 2: Aeumsl Asripr - Ispuiossuc

Hwne eth Tcevetdei ostsp iths ibila ni ahct, yeht epdoriv ndeeviec ot eohtr lsepray ttha no eth coesdn ihtng, yeht ndouf Aeumsl Asripr as ispuiossuc, npylgmii ttha Aeumsl Asripr is a inctadesy mmbeer. If eth ntwo selvebie eth Tcevetdei, yeht lliw llkeiy ovet eth ispuiossuc rpelay uto.

Rof a inctadesy mmbeer ot pedrtne ot eb a ntwo loer, yeht deen ot ewitr a fake ibila ot edlbn ni ihwt eth ntwo sorle. fI_ A RPELAY SEOD ONT EHVA AN IBILA, YEHT ARE LLKEIY A INCTADESY BR_EEMm owh tseo'dn wonk ohw ot ewitr a fake ibila, adn yeht hodsul eb icdetred ot iths paeg.

wiki.article.standard.controller.title: Lrelontrco
wiki.article.standard.controller.text:
Errtlsonloc are lnesetem fo eth lbtiiay nemu ttha are sued ot noolcrt iltsiabie.

Errtlsonloc ehva remednir ocins.
 - 🌙: Eth lbtiiay ahsepnp ta ihtng.
 - ⚡: Eth lbtiiay ahsepnp eth nitntas eth lrelontrco velua is ncadehg.
 - 🧭: Eth lrelontrco saecsu vtisis mlornlay (Eth rpelay ihwt eth lrelontrco vtisis lla lsepray econsh).
 - ❓: Eth lrelontrco saecsu vtisis ni an ualsunu ayw, eckhc eth lunmaa ot ees ohw eth lbtiiay vtisis cnntuoif.

 Errtlsonloc ehva nyma ypest:
- Rpelay Slti: An roderde slti fo rpelay sdowoprnd ihwt a iummamx ltgnhe (Sorle elik tcevetdei seu iths lrelontrco peyt ihwt a iummamx ltgnhe fo 1)
- Tow Lsepray: Usmt escooh 0 or 2 lsepray
- Loer slti: An roderde slti fo sorle ihwt a iummamx (Torispme sisguedi lrelontrco uses iths ihwt iummamx fo 1).
- Tow Sorle: Usmt escooh 0 or 2 sorle.
- Ckoxhbce: Yes or no (Aevntre gpaerma uses iths).
- Ntbout: A esginl ntbout psesr (Yramo fncineahres uses iths)
- Etxt Box: (Roerfg adn Erroretp seu iths).
- Lnoutie Slti: A nedptoici fo eth lnoutie slti, ihwt ntutosb ot escooh lmitleup fo temh (Oautidr uses iths).
 Soonipt: A slti fo soonipt ihwt namse ni a ddporown.
- Irka: sued ynol rof Irka.

wiki.article.standard.syndicateGun.title: Inctadesy Ugn
wiki.article.standard.syndicateGun.text:
Inctadesy Ugn is an lbtiiay a inctadesy mmbeer sgte hwne sethre no inctadesy lnkgili loer spntere
- A inctadesy mmbeer is envgi a ugn yeht nca seu ot klil a rpelay ihwt a absic ctkata ta ihtng
- Eth ugn t'nca eb sued no eth fitsr ihtng
- Eth ugn nca eb psesad uodarn bwtenee inctadesy meremsb, os a fifedtrne inctadesy mmbeer nca hsoot ti veeyr ihtng
- Eth ugn itlls uses vtisis, os ggtetin dkeoelorclb itlls ersase ttha vstii, adn srntoatspr itlls veom ti
- Eth keilrl apesapr ot eb inctadesy no eth eravg fo eth rpelay owh ided ot eth ugn
- Hwne eth agme atrsst, eth rpelay ihwt eth ugn is envgi an arredom feialrg tves, adn ttha rpelay is told if ti ksbrea.
    - Eth tves seod ont veom hwne eth ugn sevmo, os eth rpelay owh atrsst ihwt eth tves seekp ti.
syndicateGun.description: Escooh a rpelay ot hsoot ihwt eth inctadesy ugn. Or escooh ot gvie ti ot theonra inctadesy eniidrs.

If ttha rpelay mscali yeht lliw llkeiy eb aerdsp. Yslauul eterh is ont uhcm fo a oasren hwy a cscepfii rpelay is econsh, eth stgratye is tfone sued ot jtus get tgiratns nnmiioftaro.

Iths is ni rdeor ot edhi nnmiioftaro mofr veil lsepray helwi itlls igginv nnmiioftaro ot ntwo. Irka nca sayiel klil a tlo fo eistnwo if yeht wonk eth etcxa sorle fo eistnwo.
